_: Reviewer-rating quarantine (owner decision 2026-07-21 R2). If/when the 2026-07-12 stimulus review packet returns ratings, rows with these packet sample_ids are EXCLUDED from every interim analysis until the one-time Tier B confirmatory analysis (Amendment 1). As of 2026-07-21 no ratings have been returned (all rating columns blank). Note: packet sample_ids usually equal the sealed batch#index label, but not always — sample_id pairs_20260712T051903Z#36 carried the phrase sealed under batch index #45.
